name: Lemon Garlic Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread diagonally into 1-inch slices.
2. In a bowl, combine the melted butter, Parmesan cheese, lemon juice, lemon peel, garlic, and pepper.
3. Brush the mixture over the cut sides of the bread slices.
4. Wrap the loaf in foil.
5. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes or until heated through.
